title: server.rs: HTTP Signature keyId extracted via naive string search
description: The keyId is extracted from the Signature header using sig_header.find("keyId=\"") followed by a find for the closing quote. This does not parse the comma-separated key=value structure of the Signature header correctly. A crafted header like 'headers="(request-target)",keyId="legitimate",otherfield="evil keyId=\"attacker\""' could confuse the parser. keyId extraction should parse the header as key=value pairs, respecting quoted strings, before extracting the keyId field.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
